parameters.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$healthFile = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'Desktop\rudy-data\health-latest.json'; if (Test-Path $healthFile) { Get-Content $healthFile -Raw } else { '{\"status\": \"NO_DATA\", \"message\": \"Health file not found\"}' }"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $uptime = (Get-Date) - $os.LastBootUpTime; $cpu = (Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Measure-Object -Property LoadPercentage -Average).Average; $ramFree = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1048576,1); $disk = Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter \"DeviceID='C:'\"; $diskFree = [math]::Round($disk.FreeSpace/1073741824,1); $diskPct = [math]::Round(($disk.Size - $disk.FreeSpace)/$disk.Size*100,1); $svcs = @('RustDesk','Tailscale','n8n') | ForEach-Object { $s = Get-Service -Name $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if($s){\"$_`: $($s.Status)\"}else{\"$_`: NotInstalled\"} }; @{Uptime=$uptime.ToString('d\.hh\:mm'); CPU=$cpu; RAM_Free_GB=$ramFree; Disk_Free_GB=$diskFree; Disk_Used_Pct=$diskPct; Services=($svcs -join ', ')} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
